data.body: SCOPE (Joe): build the full v3 path as part of A2 — ship workflow.v3.schema.json (v2 + the batch construct), the v2->v3 read-time up-conversion shim (batch is additive => effectively identity), and schema.py wiring (schema_version '3' -> v3 via the existing migrate shim), THEN the batch construct (step_kind/CONTROL_KINDS, interpreter _run_batch, runner seam + reference runner, journaled plan). Honors the immutable-versioned-schema discipline; v1->v2 up-conversion infra already exists to mirror.
